author: Niche Gamer
text:
Absurdist horror Good Children Say Grace gets demo Good Children Say Grace is a psychological horror that will have you both questioning reality, and the very possibility of survival. Its demo is available now for PC.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Movement shooter EMPULSE launches this month Splitgate developer 1047 Games has announced a release date for EMPULSE is already set for later this month. Their 6v6 fast-paced movement shooter with wallrunning, grappling, and mechs is launching for PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, and PS5 on June 24th, via early access. The PC version will start being available for free on June 15th as part of […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Outward 2 launches open beta Nine Dots Studio has released an open beta for Outward 2, their hotly-anticipated open-world survival action RPG sequel. Here’s a rundown on the previously announced game, plus a new trailer: This July, Outward 2 will usher players into Aurai, an unforgiving world that is gentle to no one. You are no prophesized savior with some […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Sci-fi roguelite pinball shooter game Appulse announced Publisher Raw Fury and developer Le Rado announced Appulse, a new sci-fi roguelite pinball shooter game. Appulse is in development for Windows PC (Steam), with a release set for sometime later this year. Here’s a rundown on the game, plus its reveal trailer: In Appulse, players are challenged to master flippers and weapon recoil to control movement, […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Class of ’09 Puzzle Showdown announced Developer SBN3 has announced the latest entry in the Class of ’09 series, Class of ’09 Puzzle Showdown! Class of ’09 is an irreverent visual novel taking place in the late 2000s in highschool. Anyone who lived through that time at that age probably thought the games were hilarious and since then the series has gained a […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Dragon’s Dogma 2 finally adds unlimited fast travel Capcom has released a major update for Dragon’s Dogma 2 titled Dark Arisen, and it tackles one of the biggest complaints players have had since launch: fast travel. The addition is the Eternal Ferrystone, a new item that grants unlimited fast travel. You will receive it early in the adventure after meeting Brant during the […]
